The visitor arrived from Yahoo Search and landed directly on the Dragon Ball Fusion Generator page, indicating they were likely searching for this specific tool.
They quickly engaged with the generator by clicking the Random button multiple times in rapid succession between 00:06 and 00:10, suggesting active exploration of different fusion results.

session_insights_points: The visitor began by exploring the Dragon Ball Fusion Generator, quickly testing fusions like Vegito and Gogeta before moving on to other characters such as Majin Buu and Jiren. They initiated multiple “FUU-SION-HA!” actions early in the session (00:13), indicating strong engagement with the core feature.

Attempts to use the AI Fusion Generator were met with repeated dead clicks and rage clicks when interacting with example fusions (02:36). This suggests possible usability issues or access restrictions that led them to sign-up prompts on more than one occasion.

Later, they explored both Pokémon and Dragon Ball fusion options, selecting various characters like Pikachu, Eevee, Corviknight, Dialga, and Groudon (06:12) before returning to upload their own images in the AI Fusion tool (06:33), showing interest in custom content creation despite earlier friction points.
